chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for Theft

parts.text: 5119 - وَ رُوِيَ: "أَنَّ عَلِيّاً عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَطَعَ نَبَّاشَ اَلْقَبْرِ فَقِيلَ لَهُ أَ تَقْطَعُ فِي

text: اَلْمَوْتَى فَقَالَ "إِنَّا لَنَقْطَعُ لِأَمْوَاتِنَا كَمَا نَقْطَعُ لِأَحْيَائِنَا" ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5119 - It has been narrated that Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) ordered the hand of a grave robber to be cut off.
Imam (as) was asked: "Do you cut off (the hand) for stealing from the dead?"
Imam (as) replied: "We cut for our dead just as we cut for our living."
